title: AVPBR Retextured
description: A resource pack that improves the game textures visually with the use of labPBR features available with shaders!
body:
[![paid ad](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/085350adb5e93e28b60f320bc0d5ed371f2cc53b_0.webp)](https://joaquixlab.com/project/avpbr-retextured)


<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/y7lkyIVtxGE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Keep in mind that this version of the pack is a demo to test the pack.
If you wish to try the full version, you can try it out in Patreon!

_1.21.11 support is done!_

![Merry Christmas 2025](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c016cd36416a2aad8d5a950ac349e61c93996842_0.webp)

## What is AVPBR Retextured
AVPBR Retextured is a remake of an old resource pack of mine called [Another Vanilla PBR](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/avpbr).
Its purpose is to improve the textures of the game by using normal map and specular maps.
The pack has full labPBR support meaning that all the textures contain the features of the 
PBR format made by the ShaderLABS community. 

## Recommended Shader Settings

<details>
  <summary>Nostalgia/Kappa</summary>
  
- Lighting 
  - Direct Lighting
    - Subsurface Scatter: `LabPBR Only`
  - Indirect Lighting
    - Texture AO: `ON`
    - Emission Mode: `Hardcoded + Lab`
    - SSPT: `ON(Optional)`
    - labPBR Emission Exponent: `2.0`
- Terrain
  - Vertex Attribute Fix: `OFF`
  - Parallax Occlusion Mapping
    - Enabled: `ON`
    - POM Samples: `64+(Recommended)`
    - Self Shadow Samples: `32+(Recommended)`
    - Slope Normal Calculation: `ON(Recommended)`
  - Reflections
    - Resource Pack Reflections: `ON`
![Example of recommended settings](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/994680739843014747/1134076433900249128/2023-07-27_07.53.38.png)
  
</details>
<details>
  <summary>SEUS PTGI HRR</summary>
  
- Texture Resolution: `128`
- Raytracing
  - Full Raytrace Reflections: `ON`
  - Screen-Space Reflection Tracing: `ON`
  - Screen-Space GI Tracing: `ON`
  - Glowing Emerald Block: `OFF`
  - Glowing Lapis Lazuli Block: `OFF`
- Surface
  - Parallax Occlusion Mapping: `ON`
  - Smooth Parallax Surface: `OFF`
![Example of recommended settings](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/994680739843014747/1134076432885235732/2023-07-27_07.53.57.png)
</details>
<details>
  <summary>Complementary Reimagined</summary>
  
- RP Support: `LabPBR`
- Materials
  - SEUSPBR / LabPBR
    - POM Depth: `1.00`
  ![Example of recommended settings](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/994680739843014747/1134076433430499358/2023-07-27_07.53.44.png)
</details>

## Terms Of Usage

1. You may use and modify this pack to your liking as long as you follow rule 4.
1. You may make content with this resource pack and credit me by using at least one of these links:
    - `https://joaquixlab.com/project/avpbr-retextured`
    - `https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/avpbr-retextured`  
    - `https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/avpbr-retextured`
    - `https://www.patreon.com/joaquix1021`
1. You may not credit the pack in your name.
1. You may not redistribute the pack or its textures without permission.
